title: vetiveria filipes var. arundinacea
intro: Vetiveria filipes var. arundinacea, also known as the Dwarf or Japanese vetiver, is a type of grassy plant belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vetiveria filipes var. arundinacea include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support mental and emotional health.
